title: Contact360 docs — folder to kind routing
description: Authoritative mapping from docs/ layout to JSON kind. Used with docs/scripts/convert_md_to_json.py detect_kind() and CI ownership checks.

rules.match: legacy: README.md → index.json in same folder (excluding _archive/, json_schemas/, .git/)
rules.notes: Output stem is index.json per folder.

rules.match: docs/docs/*.json hub envelopes (canonical policy JSON under docs/docs/)
all other docs/**/*.md not matched above
includes: docs/backend/** (except graphql.modules and endpoints special cases)

lossless_fields.description: Every converted file MUST include raw_markdown with the full UTF-8 markdown source so structured fields are optional views, not the only copy.
